title: Marius et les gardiens de la cité phocéenne
original_title: Marius et les Gardiens de la Cité Phocéenne
overview: As a group of kids, whose families have been kicked out of their Marseille neighborhood, are about to leave forever, and just as they're about to pack up their dreams they find a mysterious box containing clues to a hidden treasure. Hoping to save their homes, they seek the help of Marius, the so-called "King of Marseille"?
